use_cases: Landing page hero sections for SaaS and business websites requiring visible contact information
Corporate landing pages where immediate contact details are essential for user conversion
Professional service websites needing a clean introduction with phone, address, and website details
Product launch pages with animated hero content to capture user attention
E-commerce or fintech platforms requiring trust-building contact information display
ai_summary: A professional hero section component featuring animated entrance effects using Framer Motion, displaying company branding with logo, slogan, and title alongside a contact information bar with website, phone, and address icons. Built with Tailwind CSS and a cn utility for className merging, designed to be responsive across desktop and mobile platforms. Ideal for business landing pages needing prominent contact details and smooth scroll-triggered animations.
